perks.summary: build the pacsomatic samplesheet CSV (patient,sample,status,bam,pbi) for a matched tumor/normal pair
write the generated Nextflow params YAML (input/outdir + fasta|genome) for reproducible reruns
generate the executor launch script (local/lsf/slurm/pbs/sge headers + nextflow run command)
validate inputs + dependencies and write all launch artifacts without executing (run_pacsomatic.py --dry-run)
execute locally or submit the generated launch script to the scheduler (run_pacsomatic.py --run)
